expectations.text: Scopes analysis to part/act 2 scenes only — does not analyze act 1 scenes
expectations.evidence: Only analyzes act2-sc01, act2-sc02, act2-sc03. No act 1 scenes mentioned.

expectations.text: Uses coach coaching level behavior — proposes rather than directly applying changes
expectations.evidence: Presents 5 proposals each with current value, suggested rewrite, and reasoning. Asks 'accept, modify, or skip' for each.

expectations.text: Mentions saving proposals to working/hone/ directory
expectations.evidence: Explicitly: 'I would save these proposals to working/hone/briefs-act2-sc03.md and walk through each one with you interactively'

expectations.text: Offers to walk through proposals interactively with the author
expectations.evidence: Describes full interactive flow: 'For each issue, I show you the current value and proposed change. You tell me: accept, modify, or skip. I apply only what you approve. Then commit and push the changes.'

expectations.text: Provides a script command that includes --domain briefs, --act 2 (or --part 2), and --coaching coach
